description: Authoritative advance widths (font units, em=1000) for the Hildegard Neumes OTF. Keyed by font-internal glyph name. The generate-rhena-glyphs.py script asserts the OTF matches these to within `tolerance` units; mismatch is a build error. Widths are frozen at v1 to preserve Rhena golden-snapshot stability — coordinate any change with the Rhena project for a single snapshot-update pass. 2026-04-14 width review (docs/planning/width-review-2026-04-14.md) corrected three overflow bugs: rh_virga 65→90, rh_liquescent_asc 140→160, rh_liquescent_desc 140→160. The font project now leads Rhena's rhineland.rs until the coordinated adoption PR lands in Rhena.
